authors: Archie Thomas David Nolan a School of Communication
Faculty of Arts and Social Sciences
Australiab News and Media Research Centre
raw_title: “It’s Trauma on a Deadline”: Change, Continuity and Harm After the “Racial Reckoning”
title_en: “It’s Trauma on a Deadline”: Change, Continuity and Harm After the “Racial Reckoning”
title_zh: “截止日期前的创伤”：“种族清算”后的变化、延续与伤害
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了在“种族清算”运动之后，新闻行业如何应对种族相关报道带来的创伤和压力。文章关注新闻工作者在报道种族议题时面临的情感负担、工作环境变化以及持续存在的伤害问题。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how journalism has responded to trauma and pressure related to racial reporting after the "racial reckoning" movement. It focuses on the emotional burdens journalists face when covering racial issues, changes in work environments, and ongoing harm.
research_direction_zh: 探索新闻行业在应对社会正义运动时的组织变革、职业健康以及种族议题报道的伦理实践。
research_direction_en: Exploring organizational change, occupational health, and ethical practices in racial issue reporting within journalism during social justice movements.
